subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Forgiver! Keep this devoted handmaiden of Thine, together with her children and descendants, firm in Thy Covenant and Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار ای آمرزگار این امة موقنه ات را با اولاد و احفاد بر عهد و میثاقت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
